# L&A Sweet

> Handcrafted French trompe-l'œil desserts, made fresh in Brisbane by a young French couple. Every dessert looks like a piece of fruit but reveals a delicate mousse, a fruity insert and a soft homemade biscuit inside.

## Business
- Business name: L&A Sweet
- Category: French pâtisserie, handmade desserts, trompe-l'œil desserts
- Location: 803b Stanley Street, Woolloongabba QLD 4102, Brisbane, Australia (next to Coles)
- Service area: Brisbane and surrounds
- Fulfilment: Pick-up in Woolloongabba, delivery across Brisbane
- Email: l.asweetbne@gmail.com
- Website: https://la-sweet-bne.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/l.a.sweet.bne/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@l.a.sweet.bne

## Current flavours (all A$15 each, handmade in small batches)
- Raspberry — a vibrant raspberry illusion coated in smooth white chocolate, filled with vanilla bean ganache, a soft homemade biscuit and a tangy raspberry coulis. Available now.
- Lemon — a bright lemon trompe-l'œil with a smooth white chocolate shell, soft homemade biscuit, silky lemon crémeux and vanilla ganache lifted with fresh lemon zest. Available now.
- Mango — tropical trompe-l'œil with mango-passion crémeux, homemade biscuit and vanilla ganache. Coming soon.
- Pistachio — pistachio trompe-l'œil with roasted pistachio praliné, homemade biscuit and vanilla ganache. Coming soon. Contains tree nuts.

## Ordering
- Orders are placed at https://la-sweet-bne.com
- Minimum 48 hours in advance
- Two payment options: 50% deposit online with balance in cash on collection, or full payment online
- Deposits are non-refundable within 48 hours of the collection/delivery time
- Pick-up: free, at 803b Stanley Street, Woolloongabba
- Delivery: A$10 across Brisbane under 8 pieces, free from 8 pieces

## Storage
- Refrigerate at 2–4°C
- Best consumed within 24 hours of collection or delivery

## Key pages
- [Home / Order](https://la-sweet-bne.com/): See the flavours and place an order
- [Find my order](https://la-sweet-bne.com/orders/lookup): Look up an existing order by email + order number
- [Terms & Conditions](https://la-sweet-bne.com/terms): Sale, delivery, cancellations and refunds — governed by Queensland law
- [Privacy Policy](https://la-sweet-bne.com/privacy): Data handling under the Australian Privacy Act 1988
- [Legal Notice](https://la-sweet-bne.com/legal): Business information

## About
L&A Sweet is a small handmade French pâtisserie based in Brisbane, Australia. It was founded by a young French couple bringing French pastry savoir-faire to Brisbane. Every dessert is entirely handmade in small batches, with no preservatives and no extra sugar added. The signature product is the trompe-l'œil dessert — a piece of French pâtisserie crafted to look exactly like a piece of fruit, but revealing a delicate mousse, a fruity insert and a soft homemade biscuit when cut.
